overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit urban park at night. The character approaches a food vendor stall, interacts with the vendor while crouching to examine a neon-lit grill, then continues through the environment ascending stairs to an elevated walkway beneath a highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian pathway with vertical neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved pathway through the park area toward the distant stall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera up the path ahead

entered.detail: low concrete walls lining both sides of the pathway
tall poles with bright vertical white neon lights
dense trees lining the pathway creating a canopy overhead
distant food vendor stall with white canopy visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow tree-lined pathway in a neon-lit urban park at night. Vertical light poles illuminate the paved walkway as the character approaches a distant food vendor stall visible through the dense foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall with white canopy and yellow equipment

events.description: approaching the food vendor stall area with white canopy

agents.ego_description: approaching the food stall and moving into the vendor's immediate area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the yellow food cart preparing food

entered.detail: bright yellow food cart with glowing red neon grill lights
small green tent set up next to the food stall
concrete staircase visible in the background beyond the stall

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the KNYSHA KING food vendor stall with its distinctive white canopy and yellow food cart. The vendor stands behind the cart which features a bright red neon-lit grill. A small green camping tent is set up beside the stall, and concrete stairs are visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: food preparation area with neon-lit grill

events.description: character crouches down to examine the food cooking on the neon-lit grill

agents.ego_description: crouching down next to the food cart to closely inspect the glowing red grill and food

notable_agents.action: vendor holding a drink and standing beside the cart watching the character

segments.scene_description: The character crouches down to examine the food sizzling on the cart's bright red neon-lit grill. The vendor stands nearby holding a drink while the camera focuses on the glowing grill surface and cooking food from a low angle.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area with concrete stairs leading upward

events.description: character stands up and walks away from the food stall
passing close by an NPC with red hair and bandaged arms

agents.ego_description: leaving the vendor area and walking toward the concrete stairs in the background

notable_agents.action: NPC with red hair and arm bandages standing with crossed arms

entered.detail: tall cyberpunk buildings with bright neon signage visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character stands up and walks away from the food stall, passing an NPC with distinctive red hair and bandaged arms standing with crossed arms. The character heads toward a wide concrete staircase leading upward, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the background between the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass

events.description: character begins ascending the concrete stairs
reaching the top of stairs and entering the elevated walkway with overpass

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs and continuing along the elevated pathway beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking down the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass structure running overhead
green metal utility box or small vendor structure

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairs, passing other pedestrians, and reaches an elevated walkway beneath a massive highway overpass. The area features green utility structures and more pedestrians walking along the concrete sidewalk, with neon-lit buildings towering in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban park that transitions from a secluded tree-lined path to an elevated city walkway. It begins with the character walking along a narrow paved pathway illuminated by vertical light poles, moving through dense foliage toward a distant food vendor stall. As the character arrives at the KNYSHA KING stall, the camera dips low to examine food sizzling on a bright red neon-lit grill beside a small green camping tent. The scene then shifts as the character stands and walks past a red-haired NPC, heading toward a wide concrete staircase framed by towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs and passes other pedestrians to reach an elevated walkway beneath a massive highway overpass, where green utility structures and neon buildings dominate the skyline.
